item.title: U.S. Senate passes GENIUS Act, establishing a federal regulatory framework for payment stablecoins with reserve and compliance requirements
BNY launches institutional USDC minting, redemption and custody via its digital asset platform, with Circle as its first stablecoin partner
BIS 2026 Annual Report finds stablecoin reserve flows now shift three-month Treasury bill yields, flagging systemic risk for central banks
Crypto industry intensifies lobbying for a Senate vote on the CLARITY Act before August recess; passage probability stands at 60%
SBI Holdings acquires Bitbank for $289 million, creating Japan's largest crypto exchange by assets under custody at $6.8 billion
U.S. Congress passes legislation barring the Federal Reserve from issuing a CBDC for the next four years
Moody's assigns Aaa-mf ratings to Fidelity and BlackRock tokenized money market funds, the first for blockchain-based fund vehicles
Crypto suffered 83 exploits in Q2 2026, making it the most-hacked quarter on record with cumulative industry losses at $16.7 billion
Private key theft drove 40% of crypto's $16 billion in hack losses, now the leading attack vector over smart contract exploits
Humanity Protocol lost $32 million to a private-key theft; investigators found the project's multisig wallet resided on a single laptop
A third-party vendor compromise injected malicious code into Polymarket's frontend, enabling attackers to drain $3.1 million in user funds
SecondFi lost $2.4 million to a wallet-generation software exploit, with total user exposure estimated at up to $20 million
BlackRock's IBIT Bitcoin ETF surpassed $55 billion in AUM, with BlackRock and Fidelity dominating spot Bitcoin ETF inflows in 2026
SEC's 2026-2030 Strategic Plan names digital assets a standalone oversight objective alongside investor protection for the first time
